response.overview: This film is based on speeches of and interviews with the late President of India, Servepalli Radhakrishnan, recorded between 1947 and 1966. In these speeches and interviews S. Radhakrishnan talks about his childhood, education, influences, philosophy, political career, public life, etc. The President's sojourn to the UK, the USA and the USSR are also included. Welcoming S. Radhakrishnan, the President of the USA, Mr. John F. Kennedy said, “The President is a noted philosopher. When I commented on the weather this morning, he said, we cannot always control the events but we can always control our attitude towards them.”
response.title: Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan - President of India
